'''East Asia'''

'''North Asia'''

*'''[[:en:Dili|Dili]]''', [[:en:East Timor|East Timor]] *'''[[:en:Flying Fish Cove|Flying Fish Cove]]''', ''[[:en:Christmas Island|Christmas Island]]'' ([[:en:Australia|Australia]]) *'''[[:en:Hanoi|Hanoi]]''', [[Vietnam]] *'''[[:en:Jakarta|Jakarta]]''', [[:en:Indonesia|Indonesia]] *'''[[:en:Kuala Lumpur|Kuala Lumpur]]''', [[Malaysia]] *'''[[Manila]]''', [[Philippines]] *'''[[Naypyidaw]]''', [[Myanmar]] *'''[[Phnom Penh]]''', [[:en:Cambodia|Cambodia]] *'''[[Singapore]]''' *'''[[Vientiane]]''', [[Laos]] *'''[[West Island, Cocos (Keeling) Islands|West Island]]''', City]]''', [[:en:Kuwait|Kuwait]] *'''[[Manama]]''', [[:en:Bahrain|Bahrain]] |col5 = *'''[[Muscat]]''', [[Oman]] *'''[[Nicosia]]''', [[:en:Cyprus|Cyprus]] *'''[[North Nicosia]]''', ''[[Northern Cyprus]]'' '''*''' *'''[[Ramallah]]''', ''[[State of Palestine|Palestine]]'' (de facto) '''*''' *'''[[Riyadh]]''', [[Saudi Arabia]] *'''[[Sanaa]]''', [[Yemen]] *'''[[Sukhumi]]''', ''[[:en:Abkhazia|Abkhazia]]'' '''*''' *'''[[Tbilisi]]''', [[:en:Georgia (country)|Georgia]] *'''[[Tehran]]''', [[:en:Iran|Iran]] *'''[[Tskhinvali]]''', ''[[South Ossetia]]'' '''*''' *'''[[Yerevan]]''', [[:en:Armenia|Armenia]] |belowstyle = padding:0.5em 0 0.3em; line-height:1.3em; |below = '''*''' Disputed. See: [[:en:Chagos Archipelago sovereignty dispute|Chagos Archipelago sovereignty dispute]], [[:en:Cyprus dispute|Cyprus dispute]], [[Status of Jerusalem]], [[:en:Abkhaz-Georgian conflict|Abkhaz-Georgian conflict]] and [[:en:Georgian-Ossetian conflict|Georgian-Ossetian conflict]] }} {{Documentation}}
